_doc: === SITUATION: An event, scene, action, or state in the narrative ===
_id: OPTIONAL. UUIDv7 preferred. Auto-generated if missing.
name: Clandestine Meeting at the Harbor
_name: OPTIONAL but recommended. Short 5-8 word title for the event.
description: Volkov meets an unknown contact at Warehouse 7 to exchange documents
_description: OPTIONAL but recommended. 1-2 sentence summary of what happens.

temporal._start: OPTIONAL. ISO 8601 datetime. When the situation begins.
temporal._end: OPTIONAL. When the situation ends. null = point event or unknown.
temporal._granularity: OPTIONAL (default: Unknown). One of: Exact, Day, Approximate, Unknown.
temporal._relations: OPTIONAL. Allen temporal relations to other situations. Relations: Before, After, Meets, MetBy, Overlaps, OverlappedBy, During, Contains, Starts, StartedBy, Finishes, FinishedBy, Equals.

_temporal: OPTIONAL. Temporal anchoring. If fully omitted, defaults to Unknown granularity with no dates.

spatial._precision: One of: Exact, Area, Region, Approximate, Unknown.
spatial._location_entity: OPTIONAL. UUID of a Location entity. Creates a typed spatial reference.

_spatial: OPTIONAL. Geographic anchor. Can have lat/lon, a location entity reference, or just a text description.

game_structure._game_type: One of: PrisonersDilemma, Coordination, Signaling, Auction, Bargaining, ZeroSum, AsymmetricInformation, or Custom(string).
game_structure._info_structure: One of: Complete, Incomplete, Imperfect, AsymmetricBecomingComplete, or Custom(string).
game_structure.description: Volkov knows the document contents; contact does not

_game_structure: OPTIONAL. Game-theoretic classification of the strategic interaction in this situation.
_causes: OPTIONAL. Embedded causal links pointing INTO this situation. Usually empty — use causal_links.json instead for clarity.
_deterministic: OPTIONAL. JSON object for known facts/formulas about this situation.
_probabilistic: OPTIONAL. JSON object for probabilistic assessments about this situation.
_embedding: OPTIONAL. Dense float vector. Usually null in archives.

raw_content.content: At half past ten, a figure emerged from the shadows of Warehouse 7. Volkov recognized the gait immediately — the contact was late, but here.
"You have the documents?" the contact asked without greeting.
Security cameras in the area had been disabled since 21:00.

_raw_content: OPTIONAL. Array of content blocks from the source text. content_type: Text (narration), Dialogue (speech), Observation (analyst note), Document (quoted doc), MediaRef (image/video URL). Each block can have a source reference.
_narrative_level: OPTIONAL (default: Event). Granularity: Story > Arc > Sequence > Scene > Beat > Event.

discourse._order: OPTIONAL. Narrative time distortion: analepsis (flashback), prolepsis (flash-forward), simultaneous.
discourse._duration: OPTIONAL. Narrative pacing: scene (real-time), summary (compressed), ellipsis (skipped), pause (digression), stretch (slow-motion).
discourse._focalization: OPTIONAL. UUID of the entity whose perspective we see this through.
discourse._voice: OPTIONAL. Narrator type: homodiegetic (narrator is a character) or heterodiegetic (external narrator).

_discourse: OPTIONAL. Narratological annotation describing HOW the story is told (not what happens).
_extraction_method: OPTIONAL. One of: LlmParsed, HumanEntered, StructuredImport, Sensor.
_source_chunk_id: OPTIONAL. UUID linking to a ChunkRecord in chunks/chunks.json. Tracks which ingested text chunk produced this situation.

_doc: === SITUATION: Minimal example — only required/recommended fields ===
name: Document Analysis
description: Volkov reviews the exchanged documents at his apartment

raw_content.content: Morning light fell across the scattered papers. The documents confirmed what Volkov had suspected.

name: Meridian Investigation Launched
description: Authorities open a formal investigation into Meridian Trading Co. based on leaked documents

raw_content.content: The prosecutor's office announced a preliminary investigation.
